title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入约旦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入約旦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Jordan JSMO standards screening, IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence, UN 38.3 transport, EMRC / NEPCO grid expectations, fire-safety review, and 50 Hz site requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与约旦JSMO标准筛查、IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据、UN 38.3运输、EMRC / NEPCO并网要求、消防安全审查和50Hz场址要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與約旦JSMO標準篩查、IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據、UN 38.3運輸、EMRC / NEPCO併網要求、消防安全審查和50Hz場址要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, JSMO scope determination, EMRC approval, NEPCO grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Jordan standards, grid, transport, fire, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、JSMO适用范围裁定、EMRC批准、NEPCO并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行约旦标准、并网、运输、消防、海关和项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、JSMO適用範圍裁定、EMRC批准、NEPCO併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行約旦標準、併網、運輸、消防、海關和項目要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Jordan, public sources do not show one universal BESS whole-product certificate. The practical gap is normally a route check across JSMO standards and conformity documents, IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence requested by project stakeholders, UN 38.3 lithium-battery transport files, EMRC / NEPCO grid-connection review, fire and site-safety review, and 50 Hz site settings.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口约旦时，公开资料未显示单一通用的BESS整机证书。实际差距通常是跨JSMO标准和符合性文件、项目方要求的IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据、UN 38.3锂电池运输文件、EMRC / NEPCO并网审查、消防和场址安全审查以及50Hz场址整定的路径核查。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口約旦時，公開資料未顯示單一通用的BESS整機證書。實際差距通常是跨JSMO標準和符合性文件、項目方要求的IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據、UN 38.3鋰電池運輸文件、EMRC / NEPCO併網審查、消防和場址安全審查以及50Hz場址整定的路徑核查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, standards publisher, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
